Date groups let you set specific days when orders aren't picked up or shipped, such as public or local holidays."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where failed batch tasks would repeatedly send batch job error emails. A failure will now only send once."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
